full_prompt: How would you extend the Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) approach to support reliable multi-hop reasoning over conflicting and time-sensitive sources?
How could you build on the LoRA parameter-efficient fine-tuning method to enable continual learning across many tasks without catastrophic forgetting?
How would you extend the FlashAttention approach to make long-context transformer inference more memory-efficient on edge devices?
How could you build on the Mamba state-space model architecture to improve performance on multimodal sequence tasks involving text, audio, and video?
How would you extend diffusion-based generative models to provide stronger controllability and verifiable constraints for scientific image generation?
How could you build on NeRF-style neural rendering methods to support real-time reconstruction of dynamic scenes from sparse mobile-camera input?
How would you extend graph neural network message-passing methods to better handle temporal, heterogeneous, and partially observed graphs?
How could you build on federated learning methods such as FedAvg to improve robustness against data poisoning and model inversion attacks?
How would you extend reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) to incorporate diverse stakeholder preferences without collapsing to a single reward model?
How could you build on recent chain-of-thought prompting methods to develop more faithful and auditable reasoning traces in large language models?
How would you extend contrastive self-supervised learning approaches such as SimCLR or CLIP to reduce bias when training on noisy web-scale datasets?
How could you build on recent neural code generation models to improve automated program repair for large, multi-file software projects?
How would you extend transformer-based intrusion detection methods to detect novel zero-day attacks in encrypted network traffic?
How could you build on recent differentiable architecture search methods to optimize neural networks jointly for accuracy, latency, and energy use?
How would you extend secure multi-party computation protocols to make privacy-preserving machine learning practical for low-resource organizations?
How could you build on recent learned index structures to support adaptive query processing under rapidly changing database workloads?
How would you extend foundation-model-based robotics policies to improve safe generalization in unstructured household environments?
How could you build on recent neural-symbolic reasoning methods to improve consistency and explainability in automated theorem proving?
How would you extend vision transformer segmentation methods such as Segment Anything to perform reliable segmentation in medical images with limited annotations?
How could you build on recent causal representation learning methods to improve out-of-distribution generalization in autonomous driving perception systems?
How would you extend recent physics-informed neural network approaches for battery state-of-health estimation to handle fast-charging regimes under highly variable ambient temperatures?
How could you build on transformer-based short-term load forecasting methods to improve prediction accuracy during extreme weather events and demand-response interventions?
How would you extend graph neural network approaches for distribution-grid state estimation to incorporate behind-the-meter solar, batteries, and electric vehicle charging behavior?
How could you build on recent reinforcement learning methods for building energy management to coordinate multiple buildings as a flexible virtual power plant?
How would you extend diffusion-model approaches for synthetic renewable generation data to better capture rare but grid-critical ramping and curtailment events?
How could you build on recent digital twin methods for wind turbines to integrate real-time blade fatigue monitoring and predictive maintenance scheduling?
How would you extend model predictive control approaches for microgrid operation to include hydrogen storage, electrolyzer degradation, and uncertain market prices?
How could you build on recent federated learning methods for smart-meter analytics to improve privacy-preserving detection of energy theft and appliance-level demand patterns?
How would you extend probabilistic solar forecasting methods based on deep ensembles to provide more reliable uncertainty estimates for grid operators during wildfire-smoke events?
How could you build on recent techno-economic optimization methods for green hydrogen production to account for water scarcity, renewable intermittency, and regional policy incentives?
How would you extend recent agent-based models of electric vehicle adoption to capture bidirectional charging, workplace charging access, and grid congestion impacts?
How could you build on life-cycle assessment methods for lithium-ion batteries to compare emerging sodium-ion and solid-state chemistries under realistic recycling pathways?
How would you extend recent carbon-aware computing and data-center load-shifting approaches to include grid congestion, local renewable curtailment, and cooling-system constraints?
How could you build on recent Bayesian optimization methods for catalyst discovery to accelerate low-temperature electrolysis or carbon dioxide reduction for energy applications?
How would you extend recent topology optimization approaches for heat exchangers to improve thermal performance in next-generation concentrated solar power systems?
How could you build on recent hybrid physics-machine learning models for geothermal reservoir forecasting to improve long-term predictions of induced seismicity and thermal decline?
How would you extend recent blockchain-based peer-to-peer energy trading frameworks to address scalability, regulatory compliance, and equitable participation by low-income households?
How could you build on recent stochastic unit commitment methods to better represent inverter-based resources, grid-forming controls, and declining system inertia?
How would you extend recent remote-sensing approaches for methane leak detection to enable continuous monitoring and source attribution across oil, gas, and landfill infrastructure?
How could you build on recent multi-objective optimization methods for district heating networks to integrate industrial waste heat, seasonal thermal storage, and variable electricity prices?
How would you extend recent photoredox/nickel dual-catalysis approaches for C(sp3)–C(sp2) coupling to enable selective functionalization of unactivated secondary alkyl chlorides?
How could you build on recent electrochemical C–H amination methods to develop a scalable protocol for late-stage diversification of complex pharmaceuticals?
How would you extend the latest machine-learning-guided reaction optimization workflows to predict optimal conditions for asymmetric organocatalytic transformations?
How could you build on recent single-atom catalyst designs for CO2 reduction to improve selectivity toward multicarbon products in aqueous electrolytes?
How would you extend recent metal-organic framework-based photocatalysis methods to achieve visible-light-driven nitrogen fixation under ambient conditions?
How could you build on recent flow-chemistry approaches for hazardous diazo compound generation to create safer routes to cyclopropanated pharmaceutical intermediates?
How would you extend recent enzyme-engineering methods for non-natural carbene transfer reactions to expand substrate scope toward sterically hindered alkenes?
How could you build on recent covalent organic framework membranes for organic solvent nanofiltration to improve stability under strongly acidic or basic conditions?
How would you extend recent dynamic covalent chemistry strategies for recyclable thermosets to design materials with both high mechanical strength and rapid reprocessability?
How could you build on recent perovskite surface-passivation methods to improve long-term operational stability in high-efficiency solar cells?
How would you extend recent radical relay strategies in organic synthesis to achieve enantioselective remote functionalization of saturated heterocycles?
How could you build on recent cryo-electron microscopy-guided studies of heterogeneous catalysts to correlate atomic-scale restructuring with catalytic activity under reaction conditions?
How would you extend recent data-driven retrosynthesis platforms to incorporate sustainability metrics such as solvent toxicity, energy use, and waste generation?
How could you build on recent supramolecular cage catalysis methods to control regioselectivity in challenging polyfunctional substrate transformations?
How would you extend recent aqueous micellar catalysis approaches to enable greener cross-coupling reactions of highly polar medicinal chemistry building blocks?
How could you build on recent solid-state battery electrolyte design methods to improve interfacial compatibility with lithium-metal anodes?
How would you extend recent isotope-labeling mass spectrometry methods to track transient metabolic intermediates in live-cell chemical biology experiments?
How could you build on recent high-entropy alloy catalyst approaches to tune selectivity in ammonia decomposition or synthesis reactions?
How would you extend recent automated high-throughput experimentation methods to discover new ligand architectures for earth-abundant metal catalysis?
How could you build on recent photoacid- or photobase-mediated polymerization methods to achieve spatially resolved synthesis of degradable polymer networks?
How would you extend recent diffusion-model approaches for protein design to incorporate ecological fitness constraints, such as host-microbiome interactions and environmental persistence?
How could you build on transformer-based climate downscaling methods to improve neighborhood-level heat-risk forecasts while integrating public health vulnerability data?
How would you extend graph neural network approaches for drug repurposing to include social determinants of health and real-world adherence patterns?
How could you build on recent federated learning methods in medical imaging to support cross-border pandemic surveillance while preserving patient privacy and institutional data sovereignty?
How would you extend large language model-based tutoring systems to incorporate findings from cognitive science on metacognition and self-regulated learning?
How could you build on recent remote-sensing foundation models to monitor illegal mining while integrating economic indicators and Indigenous land-rights data?
How would you extend causal machine learning approaches for policy evaluation to analyze the combined effects of housing, transportation, and air-quality interventions on asthma outcomes?
How could you build on recent agent-based modeling methods for epidemic simulation to include behavioral economics, misinformation dynamics, and adaptive public policy responses?
How would you extend multimodal AI approaches for cultural heritage analysis to combine archaeological imagery, oral histories, and environmental reconstruction data?
How could you build on recent reinforcement learning methods for smart-grid control to incorporate household energy justice, dynamic pricing ethics, and grid resilience under climate extremes?
How would you extend digital twin approaches in urban planning to model interactions among flood risk, transportation access, public health, and housing affordability?
How could you build on recent self-supervised learning methods for satellite imagery to predict crop stress while incorporating soil microbiome data and farmer-reported observations?
How would you extend human-AI collaboration frameworks in scientific discovery to study how interdisciplinary research teams evaluate, trust, and contest AI-generated hypotheses?
How could you build on recent computational social science methods for detecting online misinformation to account for linguistic diversity, platform governance, and public health communication?
How would you extend explainable AI methods used in clinical decision support to incorporate legal accountability, clinician workflow constraints, and patient-centered communication?
How could you build on recent biohybrid robotics methods to design environmental monitoring systems that respond adaptively to chemical pollution in aquatic ecosystems?
How would you extend recent network neuroscience approaches to model how sleep, stress, social interaction, and digital media exposure jointly shape adolescent mental health?
How could you build on recent carbon accounting methods using blockchain or distributed ledgers to verify supply-chain emissions while addressing labor practices and biodiversity impacts?
How would you extend generative design methods in architecture to optimize buildings simultaneously for energy efficiency, occupant well-being, cultural context, and material circularity?
How could you build on recent multimodal emotion-recognition methods to study human-robot interaction in elder care while addressing privacy, consent, and cross-cultural variation?
How would you extend recent equivariant graph neural network interatomic potential approaches to model charged defects and polarons in wide-bandgap semiconductors with DFT-level accuracy?

How could you build on diffusion-model-based crystal structure generation methods to design metastable inorganic materials that remain synthesizable under realistic temperature and pressure conditions?
How would you extend active-learning DFT workflows for high-entropy alloys to predict not only phase stability but also corrosion resistance in aqueous environments?

How could you build on recent self-driving laboratory methods for thin-film synthesis to optimize multilayer perovskite solar cell stacks with coupled constraints on efficiency, stability, and manufacturability?
How would you extend machine-learned force field approaches for lithium-ion conductors to accurately capture grain boundaries, dopant segregation, and long-timescale ion transport?
How could you build on transformer-based materials property prediction models to incorporate processing history and microstructural descriptors for additively manufactured metals?
How would you extend recent generative inverse-design methods for polymers to target recyclable thermosets with specified glass transition temperature, toughness, and depolymerization pathways?
How could you build on autonomous Bayesian optimization approaches in materials synthesis to handle noisy, multi-objective optimization of catalyst composition and surface morphology?
How would you extend recent physics-informed neural network methods for phase-field modeling to predict crack propagation in ceramic matrix composites under thermal shock?
How could you build on graph-based reaction prediction methods to map low-temperature synthesis pathways for metastable nitrides and oxynitrides?
How would you extend recent operando electron microscopy analysis pipelines using deep learning to quantify dynamic defect formation in battery cathode particles during cycling?
How could you build on machine-learning-guided high-throughput screening of 2D materials to account for substrate interactions, strain, and environmental degradation?
How would you extend recent data-driven CALPHAD integration methods to improve phase diagram predictions for refractory multi-principal-element alloys with sparse experimental data?
How could you build on large language model-assisted literature mining methods to construct reliable synthesis-condition databases for metal-organic frameworks?
How would you extend recent neural operator approaches for materials homogenization to predict nonlinear mechanical response in architected metamaterials with manufacturing defects?
How could you build on inverse-design methods for photonic crystals to create thermally stable, scalable metamaterials for radiative cooling applications?
How would you extend recent multimodal learning approaches that combine microscopy images and spectra to predict local composition-property relationships in complex oxides?
How could you build on active-learning molecular dynamics methods for solid-state electrolytes to identify interfaces that suppress dendrite growth in lithium metal batteries?
How would you extend recent topology optimization approaches for lightweight lattices to include fatigue life, damage tolerance, and additive manufacturing constraints?
How could you build on data-driven defect chemistry models for halide perovskites to design compositions with reduced ion migration and improved long-term device stability?

How would you extend Diffusion Policy for contact-rich robotic manipulation to handle discontinuous impacts and stick-slip friction in real time? Build on the denoising action-sequence formulation, but incorporate explicit hybrid contact dynamics or event-triggered replanning.

How would you build on RT-2-style vision-language-action models to improve low-level torque control for dexterous hands? Investigate whether high-level semantic priors can be coupled with impedance or operational-space controllers without sacrificing stability.

How would you extend ACT-style action chunking transformers to support safety-critical mobile manipulation in cluttered human environments? Build on the chunked imitation-learning approach by adding online constraint checking and reactive collision avoidance.

How would you build on TD-MPC2 for robotic control under severe sim-to-real dynamics mismatch? Explore adaptive latent dynamics updates or uncertainty-aware model predictive control that preserves the sample efficiency of the original method.

How would you extend DreamerV3-based world-model control to long-horizon manipulation tasks with sparse physical rewards? Build on latent imagination rollouts while adding object-centric representations or subgoal discovery.

How would you build on SayCan-like language-conditioned planning to produce dynamically feasible robot motion plans? Extend the skill-selection framework with control-theoretic feasibility estimates, such as reachability or torque-limit constraints.

How would you extend diffusion-based trajectory optimization methods to multi-robot coordination with communication delays? Build on score-based trajectory generation, but condition the sampler on decentralized observations and delay-robust constraints.

How would you build on residual reinforcement learning for robot control to improve robustness on hardware? Extend the residual-policy-over-classical-controller approach with formal stability margins or control barrier functions.

How would you extend model predictive path integral control for legged locomotion to handle deformable terrain? Build on sampling-based optimal control while learning terrain-dependent cost and dynamics corrections online.

How would you build on control barrier function methods for safe robotic manipulation to handle uncertain perception and occluded obstacles? Extend the barrier formulation with probabilistic state estimates and risk-bounded safety certificates.

How would you extend impedance learning methods for collaborative robots to adapt to individual human partners? Build on learned variable-stiffness control by incorporating online inference of human intent, strength, and comfort preferences.

How would you build on visual servoing with foundation-model features to improve closed-loop manipulation in novel scenes? Extend recent feature-based servo controllers by learning which semantic features remain stable under occlusion and viewpoint shifts.

How would you extend offline reinforcement learning methods such as IQL or CQL for real-world robot control with narrow, suboptimal datasets? Build on conservative value learning while incorporating dynamics priors, demonstrations, or safety constraints.

How would you build on differentiable MPC approaches to enable end-to-end training of visuomotor controllers? Extend the differentiable optimizer layer with learned contact models and constraints suitable for manipulation tasks.

How would you extend graph neural network-based controllers for modular robots to support hardware damage recovery? Build on morphology-aware message passing and add online system identification for failed joints or altered kinematics.

How would you build on transformer-based robot policy learning to improve temporal consistency in high-frequency control? Extend sequence modeling with stability-aware objectives, recurrent state estimation, or frequency-domain regularization.

How would you extend neural Lyapunov control methods for robotic systems with high-dimensional observations? Build on learned Lyapunov certificates while integrating perception uncertainty and partial observability.

How would you build on guided policy search for precise manipulation with deformable objects? Extend the trajectory-centric supervision pipeline with differentiable simulation or learned local models of cloth, rope, or soft materials.

How would you extend sim-to-real domain randomization approaches to better capture actuator aging and thermal effects? Build on randomized dynamics training by adding time-varying actuator models and online calibration during deployment.

How would you build on hierarchical reinforcement learning for robotic control to coordinate whole-body locomotion and manipulation? Extend the options or skills framework with shared dynamics-aware constraints between base motion, balance, and end-effector control.

How would you extend the AlphaFold-Multimer approach to predict transient, low-affinity protein complexes in signaling pathways? Propose a strategy for integrating kinetics, post-translational modifications, or cell-type-specific expression data.
How would you build on prime editing methods to improve precise genome correction in non-dividing primary human cells? Consider delivery, editing efficiency, and bystander mutation profiling.

How would you extend Perturb-seq to study combinatorial gene-gene interactions during immune cell differentiation? Design an approach that scales perturbation libraries while preserving single-cell resolution.

How would you build on spatial transcriptomics methods such as Slide-seq or Visium to capture both mRNA and protein localization in the same tissue section? Describe how this could improve analysis of tumor microenvironments.

How would you extend single-cell RNA velocity approaches to better infer cell fate transitions in tissues with slow or cyclic dynamics? Include how lineage tracing or metabolic labeling could be incorporated.

How would you build on CRISPR base editing to enable safer correction of mitochondrial DNA mutations? Discuss how editing specificity, delivery to mitochondria, and heteroplasmy shifts would be evaluated.

How would you extend organoid culture systems to model vascularized and immune-interacting human brain development? Propose experimental readouts that would show improvement over current cerebral organoid models.

How would you build on deep mutational scanning to predict how viral proteins evolve under combined antibody and antiviral drug pressure? Include how experimental fitness landscapes could be paired with computational models.

How would you extend cryo-electron tomography workflows to visualize dynamic membrane remodeling events in living or minimally perturbed cells? Consider sample preparation, temporal resolution, and image analysis.

How would you build on protein language model approaches such as ESM or ProtT5 to design enzymes with novel substrate specificity? Propose validation steps that connect sequence predictions to biochemical function.

How would you extend ATAC-seq and single-cell multiome methods to map regulatory changes during tissue regeneration? Describe how chromatin accessibility, gene expression, and spatial location could be integrated.

How would you build on multiplexed reporter assays to test the effects of human noncoding variants in disease-relevant cell types? Include how you would select variants and validate enhancer activity in endogenous genomic contexts.

How would you extend lineage-recording CRISPR barcoding methods to reconstruct developmental histories in mammalian embryos with higher temporal resolution? Discuss how barcode editing rates and cell-type annotations would be coordinated.

How would you build on expansion microscopy to map synaptic protein organization across large brain volumes? Propose a strategy that balances molecular resolution, imaging throughput, and antibody multiplexing.

How would you extend microbial genome-scale metabolic modeling to predict community-level interactions in the gut microbiome? Include how metagenomic, metabolomic, and culturing data could constrain the model.

How would you build on CAR-T cell engineering platforms to create adaptive cell therapies that respond to multiple tumor antigens and suppressive signals? Describe how synthetic receptors or logic gates could be tested for safety and efficacy.

How would you extend single-cell proteomics by mass spectrometry to quantify low-abundance signaling proteins in rare cell populations? Consider sample preparation, ion utilization, and benchmarking against imaging-based methods.

How would you build on recent optogenetic control systems to manipulate endogenous gene expression with subcellular and temporal precision? Propose a biological question where this would outperform chemical induction.

How would you extend environmental DNA metabarcoding methods to monitor functional biodiversity rather than only species presence? Include how sequencing, trait databases, or metatranscriptomics could be combined.

How would you build on high-throughput chromosome conformation capture methods such as Hi-C to study enhancer-promoter contacts in single cells over developmental time? Describe how you would distinguish stable regulatory interactions from transient contacts.

How would you extend recent Neuropixels 2.0 high-density electrophysiology approaches to track stable single-unit activity across months in freely behaving animals? What computational and experimental controls would be needed to distinguish true neural plasticity from probe drift?

How would you build on recent Patch-seq methods that combine electrophysiology, morphology, and transcriptomics to classify human cortical interneurons more precisely? Propose a design that links cell-type identity to circuit function in disease-relevant tissue.

How would you extend recent spatial transcriptomics approaches such as MERFISH or Slide-seq to capture activity-dependent gene expression changes after learning? Design a study that preserves both spatial context and temporal dynamics.

How would you build on recent single-cell multi-omics methods to map how epigenetic state shapes neuronal subtype vulnerability in neurodegenerative disease? Specify how lineage, transcriptomic, and chromatin information would be integrated.

How would you extend recent DeepLabCut-style markerless pose estimation to infer internal motivational states from behavior in rodents? Describe how neural recordings could be used to validate the inferred latent states.

How would you build on recent motion sequencing approaches for unsupervised behavioral syllable discovery to compare naturalistic social behavior across mouse models of autism? What neural features would you align to the discovered behavioral motifs?

How would you extend recent calcium imaging and deconvolution methods to improve spike inference in densely active cortical populations? Propose a validation strategy using simultaneous optical and electrophysiological recordings.

How would you build on recent all-optical physiology methods that combine two-photon calcium imaging with holographic optogenetics to test causal circuit motifs during decision-making? What stimulation patterns would reveal distributed versus localized computations?

How would you extend recent connectomic reconstruction pipelines based on serial electron microscopy to incorporate synaptic strength estimates rather than only wiring diagrams? Explain how this would change models of microcircuit computation.

How would you build on recent BARseq or MAPseq projection-mapping approaches to link long-range connectivity with transcriptomic cell identity in the thalamocortical system? Design an experiment that tests whether projection-defined cell types have distinct learning-related plasticity.

How would you extend recent self-supervised neural representation learning methods such as CEBRA to align neural activity across animals performing similar tasks? What benchmarks would demonstrate that the learned embeddings capture shared computation rather than task-irrelevant variables?

How would you build on recent latent dynamical systems models of population activity to identify when cortical dynamics change during skill acquisition? Propose a method for separating neural manifold reorganization from changes in movement kinematics.

How would you extend recent neural ordinary differential equation models to describe recurrent circuit dynamics measured with large-scale electrophysiology? Include how the model could be constrained by known anatomy or cell-type composition.

How would you build on recent foundation models for neural data to predict responses to novel sensory stimuli across individuals? What pretraining data, transfer-learning strategy, and interpretability tests would be needed?

How would you extend recent laminar fMRI and high-field imaging methods to resolve feedforward and feedback signals in human visual cortex? Propose a task that dissociates prediction, attention, and sensory evidence.

How would you build on recent diffusion MRI tractography methods with microstructural modeling to study white-matter changes in adolescent brain development? Describe how you would validate inferred tract changes against behavioral or cognitive measures.

How would you extend recent closed-loop deep brain stimulation algorithms to adapt stimulation in real time based on cortical and subcortical biomarkers? Design a study for Parkinsonian symptoms that distinguishes therapeutic adaptation from placebo or nonspecific arousal effects.

How would you build on recent human brain organoid and assembloid methods to model early circuit dysfunction in neurodevelopmental disorders? Specify how you would measure maturation, connectivity, and disease-relevant phenotypes over time.

How would you extend recent CRISPR-based perturb-seq methods to identify genes that regulate synapse formation in human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived neurons? Propose a screening design that links genetic perturbation to both molecular and functional readouts.

How would you build on recent real-time fMRI neurofeedback methods to train regulation of specific network states involved in anxiety? Describe how you would test whether learned control transfers to behavior outside the scanner.
